title: lan Steinfeld: UFO Disclosure and a Map to the Vertical History of Humanity
description: Sedona, AZ — On one level, the presence of UFOs is an open secret. Congressional hearings, multiple government confirmations, whistleblowers, and credible scientific institutions now acknowledge we are not alone in the universe. On another level, the coming government disclosure is something far greater than news headlines or television reports.
